items.title: Will McLeish stay after St Mirren's rollercoaster season?
items.summary: Interim manager Craig McLeish has not been fancied for the St Mirren job permanently. But after keeping the club up amid a rollercoaster season, will that change?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Lionel Messi Avoids Serious Injury With Inter Miami, Available For World Cup
items.summary: Tests confirm Lionel Messi avoided a serious injury after exiting Inter Miami’s win early, making him available for Argentina in the 2026 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England v New Zealand - third T20 highlights
items.summary: Coverage from Hove as England and New Zealand clash in the third of their T20 matches.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
